title: Registry Run Key Persistence via reg.exe or PowerShell
description: Detects modification of HKCU/HKLM Run and RunOnce registry keys using reg.exe or PowerShell — the most common persistence technique. Attackers add entries to auto-start malware on login. Covers both direct reg.exe ADD and PowerShell New-ItemProperty/Set-ItemProperty calls.
falsepositives: Software installers adding legitimate autorun entries
